raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Self-description of a cognitive strategy for handling binary thinking, signaling intellectual flexibility or humility.",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "The speaker occasionally adopts all-or-nothing frames of mind.",
    "Situations framed as all-or-nothing typically contain partial truth on both sides.",
    "The speaker possesses the ability and willingness to identify and consider those partial truths."
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally coherent; the statement logically pairs recognition of a cognitive bias with a corrective intention without contradiction.",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The speaker must accurately detect when they are in an all-or-nothing frame and genuinely apply the strategy of seeking partial truths rather than using the claim rhetorically.",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "The claim is invoked to create a false equivalence between sides with unequal evidentiary support, or the speaker does not actually implement the described willingness."
}

parsed_json.communicative_function: Self-description of a cognitive strategy for handling binary thinking, signaling intellectual flexibility or humility.
implicit_claims: The speaker occasionally adopts all-or-nothing frames of mind.
Situations framed as all-or-nothing typically contain partial truth on both sides.
The speaker possesses the ability and willingness to identify and consider those partial truths.
parsed_json.coherence_assessment: Internally coherent; the statement logically pairs recognition of a cognitive bias with a corrective intention without contradiction.
parsed_json.conditions_for_usefulness: The speaker must accurately detect when they are in an all-or-nothing frame and genuinely apply the strategy of seeking partial truths rather than using the claim rhetorically.
parsed_json.conditions_for_misleading: The claim is invoked to create a false equivalence between sides with unequal evidentiary support, or the speaker does not actually implement the described willingness.
